particulars.description: Fixed charge all f/h and l/h property, all fixtures and fittings, all plant machinery and other equipment, all goodwill unpaid and/or uncalled capital, all intellectual property, all securities, all loan capital, all amounts realised and non-vesting debts. Floating charge on all other debts and the property assets and rights and on the remainder of the undertaking property rights and assets. See the mortgage charge document for full details.
